selection_criteria: 1. Highest quantization tier (fp16 > bf16 > fp8 > fp4 > int8 > int4 > unknown)
2. Lowest price among providers at the highest quantization with uptime >= 99%
3. Throughput >= smoke-test rate (low bar; all selected providers clear it)
_meta.note: pinned_provider matches the provider_name field from OR /endpoints; used in provider.order with allow_fallbacks=false
_meta.key_env_split_2026_05_01: OR rate-limits per API key. To roughly halve OR wall time, the 9 v5.1 OR models are split 5/4 across two keys via the per-model `key_env` field. Key 1 (OPENROUTER_API_KEY): glm-4.7, llama-3.3-70b, mimo-v2-pro, qwen3.6-plus, grok-4-fast. Key 2 (OPENROUTER_API_KEY_2): qwen3.6-max, grok-4.20, glm-5, mimo-v2.5-pro. Split balances token-volume estimate from smoke #5 (Key 1: $0.354 smoke, Key 2: $0.284 smoke) and isolates the reasoning model (grok-4.20) on Key 2 where it is latency-bound rather than RPS-bound.

x-ai/grok-4-fast.rationale: Only provider serving this model; native xAI endpoint

x-ai/grok-4.rationale: Only provider serving this model; native xAI endpoint

x-ai/grok-4.20.rationale: Only provider serving this model; native xAI endpoint

meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct.rationale: Highest quantization (fp16) among uptime>=99% providers; 15 providers available

meta-llama/llama-4-maverick.rationale: Cheapest fp8 with uptime>=99%; Novita fp8 fails uptime (97.6%)

xiaomi/mimo-v2-pro.rationale: Only provider serving this model; native Xiaomi endpoint

xiaomi/mimo-v2.5-pro.rationale: Only provider serving this model; native Xiaomi endpoint

qwen/qwen3.6-plus.rationale: Only provider serving this model; native Alibaba endpoint

qwen/qwen3.6-max-preview.rationale: Only provider serving this model; native Alibaba endpoint

z-ai/glm-4.7.rationale: Only fp16 provider with uptime>=99%; all fp8 options fail uptime (AtlasCloud 98.3%, Parasail 96.7%, Novita 96.7%)

z-ai/glm-5.rationale: Cheapest fp8 with uptime>=99%; GMICloud fp8 fails uptime (97.5%)

minimax/minimax-m2.5.rationale: Only provider with uptime>=99% for this model

moonshotai/kimi-k2.6.rationale: Re-pinned from DeepInfra → Novita on 2026-05-01. DeepInfra repeatedly hit retry-exhaustion in smoke runs (capacity-bound). Novita already serves kimi-k2-thinking with zero 429s in same workload, providing within-family infra consistency.

moonshotai/kimi-k2-thinking.rationale: Highest quantization (bf16) with uptime>=99%; AtlasCloud int4 disqualified by lower quantization
